preconditions: Valid credentials available: Username = Admin, Password = admin123

testCases.title: Verify login page loads with all approved UI elements visible
steps: Open the login page URL in the browser
Observe the login page layout and available controls
testCases.expectedResult: Login page title 'Login' is visible along with username textbox, password textbox, Login button, and Forgot your password? link. Username and password fields are editable, Login button is clickable, and no validation or invalid credential message is displayed on initial page load.

testCases.title: Verify successful login using valid username and password
steps: Enter username as 'Admin' in the username textbox
Enter password as 'admin123' in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to URL https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/dashboard/index. Dashboard page is displayed, login form is no longer visible, and no invalid credential message is shown.

testCases.title: Verify successful login using Enter key from password field
steps: Press Enter key while cursor is inside the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login form is submitted using keyboard action without clicking the Login button and user is redirected to the dashboard URL successfully.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: User remains on the login page, dashboard URL is not opened, and visible message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed near the login form.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and invalid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication request is rejected, visible message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed, and user remains on the authentication page without dashboard access.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with both username and password invalid
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt fails with visible 'Invalid credentials' message, login page remains displayed, and dashboard page is not opened.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when username and password are left empty
testCases.expectedResult: Validation message 'Required' is displayed for both username and password fields. Login request is not submitted and user remains on login page.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when username is empty and password is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Validation message 'Required' is displayed for username field only. Login request is blocked and dashboard page is not opened.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when password is empty and username is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Validation message 'Required' is displayed for password field only. User remains on login page and authentication request is not processed.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Password field masks all entered characters with hidden or bullet-style characters and actual password text is not visible on screen.

testCases.title: Verify username field handling of leading and trailing spaces
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the username input consistently. User either logs in successfully after trimming spaces or receives a visible authentication rejection message without UI breakage, page crash, or frozen controls.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior when password contains leading and trailing spaces
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails with visible 'Invalid credentials' message if spaces are treated as part of the password value. User remains on login page and dashboard URL is not opened.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only values are not accepted in username and password fields
steps: Enter only spaces in username textbox
Enter only spaces in password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not successful. User remains on login page and either validation message 'Required' or message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed without navigation to dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts pasted text input
steps: Copy the value 'Admin' from an external source
Paste the value into username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted username value is accepted correctly, login request is processed successfully, and dashboard page is displayed after authentication.

testCases.title: Verify password field accepts pasted text input securely
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted password remains masked in the password field and user is authenticated successfully without exposing the pasted password text.

testCases.title: Verify login button behavior on repeated rapid clicks
steps: Click the Login button repeatedly multiple times in quick succession
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes only one successful login session, redirects once to the dashboard page, and does not display duplicate requests, duplicate sessions, browser errors, or broken UI behavior.

testCases.title: Verify username field handles very long input gracefully
steps: Enter a username value significantly longer than expected normal length
testCases.expectedResult: Application remains responsive, login page layout does not break, and authentication is rejected with visible validation or invalid credentials message without browser crash.

testCases.title: Verify password field handles very long input gracefully
steps: Enter a password value significantly longer than expected normal length
testCases.expectedResult: Application remains stable and responsive, password field continues masking input, and authentication is rejected without layout corruption or application error.

testCases.title: Verify login is case sensitive for username
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails with visible 'Invalid credentials' message and user remains on login page when incorrect username case is entered.

testCases.title: Verify login is case sensitive for password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails with visible 'Invalid credentials' message because password case does not match the valid credential value.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in username field are rejected during login
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails with visible 'Invalid credentials' message and user stays on login page without navigation to dashboard.

testCases.title: Verify special characters in password field do not break authentication flow
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected with visible 'Invalid credentials' message and login page continues functioning normally without UI or browser errors.

testCases.title: Verify Forgot your password link navigation
testCases.expectedResult: User is redirected from the login page to the password recovery workflow page and login form is no longer displayed.

testCases.title: Verify successful logout returns user to login page
steps: Click on the logged-in user menu
testCases.expectedResult: Authenticated session is terminated successfully and application redirects back to the login page URL with username textbox, password textbox, and Login button visible again.

testCases.title: Verify invalid credential message disappears after successful login attempt
steps: Attempt login with invalid credentials and observe the invalid credentials message
Correct the username and password using valid credentials
testCases.expectedResult: Previously displayed invalid credentials message is cleared after successful authentication and user is redirected to the dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify tab navigation order on login page
steps: Press Tab key repeatedly to navigate through interactive controls
testCases.expectedResult: Keyboard focus moves sequentially from username textbox to password textbox to Login button and then to Forgot your password? link without skipping controls.

testCases.title: Verify login page remains accessible after failed login attempt
steps: Observe page state after error message appears
testCases.expectedResult: Username textbox, password textbox, Login button, and Forgot your password? link remain visible, enabled, and usable after failed authentication attempt.

testCases.title: Verify username and password field behavior after invalid login attempt
steps: Enter invalid username and password values
Observe the values displayed in username and password fields after the error message appears
testCases.expectedResult: Username field retains the entered username value after failed login attempt while password field remains masked or is cleared according to application behavior. Invalid credentials message remains visible.
